name: Suspicious File Created by Office Application
notes:
This rule detects executable and script file creation by Office applications.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Vadim Khrykov (ThreatIntel), Cyb3rEng (Rule)
SIGMA Title: Created Files by Office Applications
SIGMA Description: This rule will monitor executable and script file creation by office applications. Please add more file extensions or magic bytes to the logic of your choice.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(winword|excel|powerpnt)\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of [exe or dll or ocx or com or ps1 or vbs or sys or bat or scr or proj or vba or jse or vbe or js]

when the event matches (LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE 'c:\users\%' and LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\office\%' and LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE '%\webservicecache\allusers%') and LOWER("File Extension") LIKE 'com' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'winword.exe' and LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\webexdelta\%' and (LOWER("File Extension") LIKE 'dll' or LOWER("File Extension") LIKE 'exe') AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE '%\appdata\local\assembly\tmp\%' and LOWER("File Extension") LIKE 'dll' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious File Created by Office Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(winword|excel|powerpnt)\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of [exe or dll or ocx or com or ps1 or vbs or sys or bat or scr or proj or vba or jse or vbe or js]

AND NOT when the event matches (LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE 'c:\users\%' and LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\office\%' and LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE '%\webservicecache\allusers%') and LOWER("File Extension") LIKE 'com' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'winword.exe' and LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\webexdelta\%' and (LOWER("File Extension") LIKE 'dll' or LOWER("File Extension") LIKE 'exe') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Target File Directory") LIKE '%\appdata\local\assembly\tmp\%' and LOWER("File Extension") LIKE 'dll' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious File Created by Office Application
Event description: Detects executable and script file creation by Office applications.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
